title: GEOJIT ACE
subtitle: HRMS
description: Developed an enterprise-grade HRMS application featuring an integrated Learning Module.

Engineered precise location-based attendance tracking using Google Cloud Maps API, featuring advanced geofencing validation for punch-ins.
Developed a dedicated Learning module for employee training and development.
Utilized GetX for highly efficient state management and routing.
